release_notes: Bugfix — Windows process tracking. The launcher used Linux/macOS Singleton{Lock,Cookie,Socket} file probes to detect whether a running Chromium was still alive; on Windows those files do not exist (Chromium uses a named mutex instead), so the poller always reported the profile as dead, the running-count stuck at 0 and graceful kill could not target the live PID. Now Windows probes the PID directly via process.kill(pid, 0). Also removed the redundant ✕ in the profile editor — the window's own ✕, the Cancel button and ESC are enough.
